prompt: What is the average fill rate of course sections?

inputData.question: What is the average fill rate of course sections?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average fill rate of course sections?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average fill rate of course sections?"},"startedAt":1771855491477,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the average fill rate of course sections. Fill rate is calculated as the ratio of enrolled students to maximum capacity. I need to:
1. Count active enrollments per course section
2. Get the max_students capacity for each section
3. Calculate fill rate as (enrolled_count / max_students)
4. Average across all sections

The schema has course_sections (with max_students) and enrollments (with is_active flag). I'll join these tables, count active enrollments per section, calculate individual fill rates, then average them.","sql":"
SELECT 
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(enrolled_count AS NUMERIC) / cs.max_students), 4) AS average_fill_rate
FROM course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) AS enrolled_count
  FROM enrollments
  WHERE is_active = true
  GROUP BY course_section_id
) e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
WHERE cs.max_students > 0
","assumptions":["Fill rate is calculated as the ratio of active enrollments to max_students capacity","Only active enrollments (is_active = true) are counted","Sections with max_students = 0 are excluded to avoid division issues","Sections with no enrollments are treated as having 0 enrolled students"]},"endedAt":1771855511727},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Average Fill Rate of Course Sections

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(enrolled_count AS NUMERIC) / cs.max_students), 4) AS average_fill_rate
FROM course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) AS enrolled_count
  FROM enrollments
  WHERE is_active = true
  GROUP BY course_section_id
) e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
WHERE cs.max_students > 0

visualization.title: Average Fill Rate of Course Sections

result.sql:
SELECT 
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(enrolled_count AS NUMERIC) / cs.max_students), 4) AS average_fill_rate
FROM course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) AS enrolled_count
  FROM enrollments
  WHERE is_active = true
  GROUP BY course_section_id
) e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
WHERE cs.max_students > 0
